avatar_help: Pick the 3D head and framing the patient panel uses for this case. Leave on Auto to inherit the {slot} default.
avatar_preview_empty: Pick an avatar to preview here.
avatar_stale_after: is no longer in the manifest. Runtime will fall back to the platform default.
master_catalog_warning_after: master catalog at runtime. Editing the master catalog will retroactively change behaviour for every case configured to use that treatment. Per-case overrides aren't yet exposed in this UI.
master_catalog_warning_before: Treatments below pull their effect values (onset, duration, vital-sign deltas) live from the shared
voice_default_note: No voice is set here — the platform default “{playing}” will play.
voice_engines_help: Voices from every enabled engine are listed below — each voice plays on its own engine (free local engines and paid cloud APIs are labelled). Leave empty to inherit the Patient persona's default.
voice_help_after: . Leave the voice empty to inherit the Patient persona's default.

voice_unplayable_note: “{requested}” needs the “{provider}” engine, which is not available here. Configured voices are never substituted — playback fails with an error until the engine is fixed or the voice is re-picked.
